entry.title: IDC W15P7T11DG402 (P00138) awarded to GENERAL DYNAMICS C4 SYSTEMS, INC., was modified for the amount of $0

ns1:typeOfContractPricing.description: ORDER DEPENDENT (IDV ALLOWS PRICING ARRANGEMENT TO BE DETERMINED SEPARATELY FOR EACH ORDER)

ns1:contractData.ns1:descriptionOfContractRequirement: THIS IS A MODIFICATION THAT ADDS COMMERCIAL ITEMS TO THE BASE CONTRACT. NO ITEMS ARE BEING PURCHASED AT THIS TIME. ITEMS WILL BE PURCHASED ON DO AT A LATER POINT IN TIME.

ns1:principalNAICSCode.description: ALL OTHER MISCELLANEOUS ELECTRICAL EQUIPMENT AND COMPONENT MANUFACTURING

ns1:recoveredMaterialClauses.description: NO CLAUSES INCLUDED AND NO SUSTAINABILITY INCLUDED

entry.title: IDC W15P7T11DG402 (P00139) awarded to GENERAL DYNAMICS C4 SYSTEMS, INC., was modified for the amount of $0

ns1:typeOfContractPricing.description: ORDER DEPENDENT (IDV ALLOWS PRICING ARRANGEMENT TO BE DETERMINED SEPARATELY FOR EACH ORDER)

ns1:contractData.ns1:descriptionOfContractRequirement: THIS IS A MODIFICATION TO A BASE IDIQ CONTRACT THAT ADDS COMMERCIAL PRODUCTS TO THE CONTRACT FOR ORDERING AT A LATER POINT IN TIME. THIS IS NOT AN ORDER. ORDERS WILL BE MADE ON SEPARATE DELIVERY ORDERS.

ns1:principalNAICSCode.description: ALL OTHER MISCELLANEOUS ELECTRICAL EQUIPMENT AND COMPONENT MANUFACTURING

ns1:recoveredMaterialClauses.description: NO CLAUSES INCLUDED AND NO SUSTAINABILITY INCLUDED
